label: Transparent clownfish motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, copied from this worker's generated-images snapshot, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated clownfish motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single friendly but anatomically credible ocellaris clownfish, full body visible, vivid orange body, clean white bands, crisp black stripe borders, black-edged fins, subtle sea-green reflected highlights from a reef anemone environment, fine scale texture, natural glossy eye, and gently curved swimming posture. The motif should emphasize the readable clownfish stripe rhythm that can drive UI components. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop tail, fins, head, or stripe bands. Slight three-quarter side view, calm approachable expression, catalog-quality silhouette. Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange, white, black, and sea-green details without shadows on the background. Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no anemone, no coral, no reef scene, no water, no bubbles, no second fish, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in image generation using the transparent motif as visual context, copied from this worker's generated-images snapshot, then resampled and saved as a 3840x2160 16:9 PNG.
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Clownfish light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent clownfish motif is the source reference for palette, stripe rhythm, texture, contrast, and interaction language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Clownfish", derived from the visible transparent clownfish cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels, sparse enough to survive gallery preview downscaling; avoid dense tiny paragraphs. Required visible sections: Morphous Clownfish, Clownfish, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from the clownfish's vivid orange body, clean white bands, crisp black stripe borders, sea-green anemone reflections on fin edges, glossy scale texture, rounded friendly silhouette, and rhythmic stripe segmentation. UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, progress rings, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, data cards, and simple product icons. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible friendly product system, precise product grid, 8px maximum card radius, warm reef-light surfaces, clownfish-orange primary actions, sea-green accents, charcoal stripe borders, soft white band surfaces, subtle scale grain, banded dividers inspired by clownfish stripes, approachable operational UI rather than a marketing page. Typography: show English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance, with short readable Japanese samples such as ナビゲーション, 検索, 状態, and データ. Use compact product typography with a friendly roundness. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from orange, white, black, sea green, reef shadow, and soft water highlights; avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple/blue gradients, and one-note orange dominance. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Clownfish" or "Clownfish", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
workflow: Built-in image generation using the transparent motif and light board as visual context, copied from this worker's generated-images snapshot, then resampled and saved as a 3840x2160 16:9 PNG.
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Clownfish dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent clownfish motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Clownfish". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible clownfish cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels, sparse enough to survive gallery preview downscaling; avoid dense tiny paragraphs. Required visible sections: Morphous Clownfish, Clownfish, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Preserve the light board's friendly product-system language, section coverage, navigation pattern, cards, forms, table, search palette, status states, token rows, texture samples, 8px radius, stripe rhythm, and chart coverage. Visual details: dark background derived from reef shadow, stripe black, and deep sea-green anemone shade; foreground from clownfish white bands and water mist; primary actions from vivid clownfish orange; secondary and focus states from sea green; surfaces from charcoal reef, ink black, and deep teal; borders from black stripe edges; subtle scale-grain texture and banded clownfish stripe dividers. UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, progress rings, empty/loading/error states, forms, tables, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Typography: show English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance, with short readable Japanese samples such as ナビゲーション, 検索, 状態, and データ. Use compact product typography with a friendly roundness. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from orange, white, black, sea green, reef shadow, and water highlights; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no one-note orange dominance. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Clownfish" or "Clownfish", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
